info.title: Blastable API
info.description: Blastable is a simple but powerful email software that focuses on email inbox deliverability. This API provides endpoints for managing lists, subscribers, templates, segments, senders, sending domains, and campaigns.

get.summary: Search for subscriber by email across all lists

DomainId.name: domain_id
DomainId.description: Unique identifier for the sending domain

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key
